nasb.text: “On exactly the tenth day of this seventh month is the day of atonement; it shall be a holy convocation for you, and you shall humble your souls and present an offering by fire to the Lord.

esv.text: “Now on the tenth day of this seventh month is the Day of Atonement. It shall be for you a time of holy convocation, and you shall afflict yourselves and present a food offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: “七月初十是贖罪日；你們應當有聖會，要刻苦己心，獻火祭給耶和華。

ccb.text: “七月十日是赎罪日，你们要举行圣会，禁食，献火祭给耶和华。
